Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xA580 "EXPRESSRAIDER-A580" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Express Raider.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The real start address is $F41A. However, we need to first copy from $7200-$7400 to $0200-$0400 (512 bytes) as was performed during the original loading process, so this overwrites our loader code. Therefore we just JMP to $F41A at the end of the init code added at $A580 instead of using RTS.
